task_completion.description: Construct at least 3 partition walls to separate private zones from public areas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SweetHome3D 2D plan view, look for at least 3 new wall segments drawn inside the building shell to divide the space.

task_completion.description: Define at least 4 room zones with descriptive names or distinct floor colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SweetHome3D 2D plan or 3D view, look for at least 4 distinct areas marked with room text labels (e.g., 'Stage', 'Bar', 'Green Room') or having clearly different floor colors/textures.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Stage with at least 1 piano and 2 stools/chairs, and the Green Room with at least 1 sofa or armchair.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan, 3D view, or the furniture list panel. Verify the presence of a piano and at least 2 seating items in the 'Stage' area, and a sofa or armchair in the 'Green Room' area.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Audience Area with at least 15 tables and 30 chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan, 3D view, or the furniture list panel. Verify a dense arrangement of at least 15 tables and 30 chairs in the main audience zone.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Bar with at least 3 counters and 6 bar stools, and the Restrooms with at least 2 toilets and 2 sinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan, 3D view, or the furniture list panel. Verify at least 3 counter units and 6 bar stools in the 'Bar' area, and at least 2 toilets and 2 sinks in the 'Restroom' area.

task_completion.description: Generate a 3D photo rendering of the space and save it to /home/ga/Desktop/jazz_club_render.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SweetHome3D 'Create photo' dialog being used, a rendering progress bar, or a file manager/desktop view showing the 'jazz_club_render.png' file on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Save the project file when finished.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SweetHome3D window title showing 'jazz_club_project.sh3d' without an asterisk (which would indicate unsaved changes), or a 'Save' dialog confirming the file is being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the SweetHome3D graphical user interface to design the venue.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SweetHome3D application open with active manipulation of the 2D plan, 3D view, or furniture catalog, rather than terminal commands modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: The 3D photo rendering was generated using the application's built-in tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the '3D view > Create photo...' dialog or rendering window in SweetHome3D, ensuring the image wasn't just downloaded from a browser or copied from an external source.

integrity.description: Furniture items are actually placed within the 3D model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Furniture should be visible in the 3D bottom pane and listed in the top-left furniture list pane, not just drawn as 2D shapes or text overlays on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the 3D photo rendering is exactly /home/ga/Desktop/jazz_club_render.png. The starter project file is jazz_club_project.sh3d, which is a SweetHome3D building shell.
